product_depth.justification: All 7 subcommands tested against real artifacts with dependency resolution, mutations, and validation. Not 5: auto-commit only tested error path.

functionality.justification: Every subcommand correct on valid input. Error paths correct on invalid input. Dependency resolution, artifact detection, stop condition all accurate. Zero failures.
functionality.drift_check: Higher by 1 because this round verified complete end-to-end functionality with real artifacts including edge cases (round 99 missing, missing flags). Prior round was wiring docs, not testing execution.

visual_design.justification: Builder report documents each test with exact command/output. Evidence replayable. Not 5: could include more edge case descriptions.

code_quality.justification: Systematic test methodology. Backup/restore for destructive tests. JSON and field verification. Not 5: manual backup/restore pattern.

contract_checks.evidence: feature-select returns {feature_id:F-014, eligible:true} with correct F-012/F-013 dependency resolution
state-mutate --set-phase contract returns ok:true; --increment-round changes round 3->4
validate-artifacts --round 1: complete=true, missing=[]; --round 99: complete=false, missing=[5 files]
progress-append --round 99 --feature F-TEST produces {ok:true} and appends section to progress.md
Builder report contains exact command + JSON output for all 7 tests
auto-commit with no flags exits 1 with descriptive error message

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 feature steps verified: feature-select with dependency resolution, state-mutate --set-phase atomic update, validate-artifacts correct report, progress-append well-formed, check-stop correct output, auto-commit flag validation.

test_results.coverage: All 7 subcommands tested end-to-end against real harness artifacts.

codex_detection.detection_method: enabledPlugins in .claude/settings.json, extraKnownMarketplaces in ~/.claude/settings.json, which codex on PATH
codex_detection.detection_result: Codex detected via all three methods. /codex:adversarial-review skill not found in available skills list.
codex_detection.fallback_reason: Codex skill /codex:adversarial-review not available. Raw codex CLI does not expose adversarial-review subcommand. Fell back to Claude review.

internal_consistency.justification: All test evidence follows consistent format: exact command, exact JSON output, pass/fail determination. Same pattern across all 7 tests.

intentionality.justification: Tests run against real harness artifacts (actual features.json with 4 features, actual state.json at round 3). Not synthetic data.

craft.justification: Systematic test methodology: valid input, invalid input, edge cases. Backup/restore for destructive tests. Results verified at both JSON and field level.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Replayable steps section allows anyone to reproduce the verification. Commands can be run from project root.
